---
title: "Blog (EN)"
listing:
  - id: "all"
    # categories: numbered
    contents:
      - "."
    exclude:
      filename:
        - "index.qmd"
    feed: true
    fields:
      - "title"
      - "date"
      - "image"
      - "categories"
      - "description"
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title"
    type: default
share: false
---

::: {.category-buttons}
[All](.){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[blog (1)](#category=blog){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[tech-ai (1)](#category=tech-ai){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {#all}
:::
